nasb.text: so that he will not profane his offspring among his people; for I am the Lord who sanctifies him.’ ”

esv.text: that he may not profane his offspring among his people, for I am the Lord who sanctifies him.”

cnv.text: 不可在自己的族人中，羞辱他的後裔，因為我是使他們分別為聖的耶和華。”

ccb.text: 以免在民中玷污自己的子孙，因为我是使他们圣洁的耶和华。”
